check.name: scope_boundary
check.result: PASS — 변경 파일 3개 모두 PM scope 내 (MT-1: test_three_gate_e2e.py, MT-2: test_three_gate_pipeline.py, MT-3: tests/test_codex_review.py)

check.name: fixture_fields
check.result: PASS — codex_review_result fixture 20개 필드 포함 (schema_version, pipeline_id, stage, result, reviewer, review_model, requested_model_id, actual_model_id, actual_model_verified, actual_model_source, review_provider, raw_output_path, reviewed_files, findings, diff_sha256, created_at, history)

check.name: new_tests_T5_T6
check.result: PASS — T5: model_output_json source → FAIL 검증. T6: actual_model_verified 누락 → FAIL 검증
